title: acer palmatum f. ornatum
intro: Acer palmatum f. ornatum, also known as Japanese maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acer palmatum f. ornatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-aging properties. The herbal preparation of Acer palmatum f. ornatum is typically made into a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
